peds_runtime_rules.max_daily_dose: max 60 mg/kg/day routine; do not exceed label max
peds_runtime_rules.notes: Use local product concentration to convert to mL.
Avoid dehydration, renal disease, GI bleed, varicella caution.
Do not use adult tablet in young child if cannot swallow.

peds_runtime_rules.dose_formula: give small frequent sips; replace losses; Plan A/B by dehydration status

peds_runtime_rules.notes: Use amoxicillin component for dose; diarrhea common.
QT/drug interaction caution; not routine first-line.
Avoid contact lens during active red eye.

peds_runtime_rules.dose_formula: use lowest potency; thin layer OD–BID
10–15 mg/kg/dose PO q4–6h PRN; mL = dose_mg / 120 * 5
peds_runtime_rules.max_daily_dose: max 60 mg/kg/day routine; do not exceed label max

peds_runtime_rules.dose_formula: 10–15 mg/kg/dose PO q4–6h PRN; mL = dose_mg / 60 * 0.6
peds_runtime_rules.max_daily_dose: max 60 mg/kg/day routine; do not exceed label max

peds_runtime_rules.dose_formula: 5–10 mg/kg/dose PO q6–8h PRN; mL = dose_mg / 100 * 5
use product age/weight band; do not calculate if band unavailable

antibiotic_runtime_gates.alternative_logic: macrolide only if appropriate allergy/local resistance policy

antibiotic_runtime_gates.first_line_logic: penicillin/amoxicillin when GAS confirmed/likely by test criteria
antibiotic_runtime_gates.duration_logic: usually 10 days for beta-lactam; per guideline

antibiotic_runtime_gates.first_line_logic: topical antibiotic only when bacterial pattern/need
nitrofurantoin if lower UTI and renal OK
oral antibiotic if mild cellulitis and no systemic red flags
dental source control + antibiotic only when spreading/systemic risk
antibiotic_runtime_gates.duration_logic: short course per local dental guidance

antibiotic_runtime_gates.first_line_logic: eradication regimen only after confirmed active infection/local protocol
not first-line default; use only if local guideline/allergy/diagnosis supports
antibiotic_runtime_gates.block_when: viral URI, non-bacterial sore throat, nonspecific cough

antibiotic_runtime_gates.alternative_logic: avoid pregnancy/young child; clinician diagnosis required
antibiotic_runtime_gates.block_when: viral URI, pregnancy, child without accepted indication

antibiotic_runtime_gates.first_line_logic: only after compatible diagnosis/testing or clinician judgement
antibiotic_runtime_gates.block_when: simple viral diarrhea or nonspecific vaginal symptoms without assessment

antibiotic_runtime_gates.first_line_logic: Topical antibiotic for localized impetigo; oral antibiotic only for extensive/systemic/worsening disease.
antibiotic_runtime_gates.alternative_logic: Use oral agent only if extensive lesions, cellulitis, fever, outbreaks, or clinician confirms.
antibiotic_runtime_gates.block_when: noninfected dermatitis/tinea/viral rash; large abscess; systemic toxicity needs in-person evaluation.
antibiotic_runtime_gates.duration_logic: Topical short course; oral per guideline/local policy.

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: short course with food if no contraindication
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: active GI bleed, severe renal disease, late pregnancy, duplicate NSAID, high CV risk without clinician review
safety_runtime_gates.quick_caution: GI bleed/renal/CV risk; avoid duplicate NSAID

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: adult or older child per label
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: age <2 absolute block for decongestant/antihistamine cough-cold products; avoid <4 unless clinician-directed

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: use ≤3 days
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: use >3 days, severe HTN/arrhythmia caution

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: verified bacterial disease gate
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: viral URI/bronchitis/noninfected rash/no bacterial criteria
safety_runtime_gates.quick_caution: must pass disease-specific ABX gate; v4 adds cephalosporin/tetracycline/antiprotozoal/vaginal antimicrobial gates

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: only when alternatives unsuitable and disease gate exists
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: routine cystitis/bronchitis/sinusitis if alternatives suitable

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: specialist diagnosis/follow-up
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: routine red eye, undiagnosed infection, contact lens keratitis concern

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: rare short selective use after diagnosis
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: routine tinea/cruris/corporis first-line

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: short course after QT risk screen
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: known QT prolongation, arrhythmia, strong CYP3A4/QT interacting meds

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: migraine-specific restricted use
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: pregnancy, CAD/stroke, uncontrolled HTN, potent CYP3A4 inhibitors

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: diagnosis confirmed and monitoring available
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: no labs/uncertain diagnosis/acute complaint only
safety_runtime_gates.quick_caution: review-only, not instant OPD FAST prescription

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: asthma/allergic rhinitis adjunct when benefits outweigh risks
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: mild rhinitis when alternatives adequate or mental health adverse concern
safety_runtime_gates.quick_caution: boxed-warning style caution for neuropsychiatric effects

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: known existing indication and clinician review
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: new start in FAST MODE or unstable symptoms
safety_runtime_gates.quick_caution: reference/continuation only, not acute OPD default

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: eligibility reviewed and no contraindication
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: pregnancy suspected, migraine aura, VTE risk, smoker age >35 for CHC, severe HTN, interacting drugs

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: adult, short course, understands sedation precautions
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: elderly/fall risk, driving, alcohol, severe QT risk, young child without dose rule

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: short course on appropriate non-sensitive area
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: face/groin/children/large area/infected rash unless clinician-directed
safety_runtime_gates.quick_caution: high potency; not routine dermatitis FAST default

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: uncomplicated constipation rescue; adult unless peds dose available
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: acute abdomen, vomiting, obstruction, severe dehydration, infant/child without product dose
safety_runtime_gates.quick_caution: avoid obstruction; pediatric dose must be exact

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: browse/reference only
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: any automatic RX NOW/SWAPS default use

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: mild irritation/discharge without pain/photophobia/vision loss/contact lens corneal concern
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: severe eye pain, photophobia, vision loss, corneal opacity, contact lens with pain, trauma/chemical exposure
safety_runtime_gates.quick_caution: urgent eye evaluation for pain/vision loss/contact lens corneal symptoms

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: avoid steroid in suspected tinea unless clinician confirms alternate/inflammatory diagnosis
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: tinea corporis/cruris/pedis suspected; ringworm/jock itch with active border

safety_runtime_gates.allow_condition: not pregnant, no GI bleed/renal/CV high risk, short course with food
safety_runtime_gates.block_condition: pregnancy especially after 20 weeks/late pregnancy, renal disease, GI bleed, duplicate NSAID
safety_runtime_gates.quick_caution: avoid NSAID in pregnancy/renal/GI bleed risk
